at_a_glance: You have spent $0.61 in 1 session covering the full planning stack: architecture, spec, plan, and spec review. The new-app: skill was the heaviest item at $0.30 — it generated 8 documents in a single pass. No code has been written yet; Phase 1 starts next.

session_narratives.2026-04-18-001: Full planning session covering architect:, new-app:, and spec-review: in sequence. Produced ARCHITECTURE.md, SPEC.md, PLAN.md, CLAUDE.md, TASKS.md, and the full vibe/ folder. One P0 spec gap (missing mode system prompts) was caught and fixed before the build begins — a cheap fix at planning time versus an expensive one mid-Phase 2.

recommendations.title: Prompt caching not yet active — will save money in build sessions
recommendations.body: CLAUDE.md and vibe/ARCHITECTURE.md will be read at the start of every session. Once these files stabilise after Phase 1, Anthropic prompt caching will kick in automatically, reducing re-read costs by 90%. Avoid editing CLAUDE.md between tasks unnecessarily — every change resets the 5-minute cache TTL.

forecast_narrative: Phase 1 has 9 foundation tasks (P1-001 through P1-009) — expect 1–2 sessions at $0.20–0.40 each. Phase 2 has 5 features of varying size; the Claude CLI integration and state machine will be the heaviest. Total project estimate: $1.50–2.50 for a clean v1 build at current session patterns.
